calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

David P. Wasserman, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Windeler LLC.
Casey Dias, Property Supervisor for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Joseph McNair, an individual.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on February 19, 2019.
Defendant's answer was filed on February 25, 2019.
Notice of Time & Place of Trial was served on March 7, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, March 25, 2019.

Plaintiff submitted to the following exhibit for identification and the Court's review:

Exhibit 1: Residential Lease Agreement dated 3/11/2011................................ID/EVID

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Windeler LLC, and against defendant Joseph McNair, an individual, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $3,127.40.
Holdover Damages - $710.50.
Total: $3,837.90.

Additionally, plaintiff Windeler LLC is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 424 Ellis Street, Unit 606, San Francisco, CA 94102.

The rental agreement is canceled and the lease is forfeited.

Counsel STIPULATES to the return of the exhibit.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD COURT TRIALS
Off Calendar Mar-25-2019 Assigned To Trial Court
